final:
module SRAM_Cell (
    input wire [3:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= D ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
